title: Implement secretx-barbican backend (OpenStack)
description: Implement the OpenStack Barbican (Key Manager Service) backend. Stub README exists at secretx-barbican/README.md. URI: secretx:barbican:<secret-uuid>. Auth via standard OS_* environment variables (Keystone user/pass or OS_TOKEN + OS_BARBICAN_ENDPOINT). Single crate covers OVHcloud, Open Telekom Cloud (T-Systems), Cleura, STACKIT, VK Cloud, and any private OpenStack operator. Implements SecretStore and WritableSecretStore.
